title: bee_state.mjs — CLI verbs for every state.json mutation
action: Create skills/bee-hive/templates/bee_state.mjs following the exact thin-CLI shape of bee_cells.mjs (verb dispatch, flag parsing, ERROR/WHY/FIX denial messages, atomic write via the lib helpers). Verbs: 'set' (--phase, --mode, --feature, --next-action, --summary; only provided flags are written, phase validated with isKnownPhase from lib/state.mjs (NOT the PHASES array — compounding-complete must pass, or feature close deadlocks once the write-guard rule lands)), 'gate' (--name context|shape|execution|review --approved true|false, idempotent), 'worker' (add|update|remove|clear with --nickname --cell --tier --status; remove by nickname; clear empties the array), 'scribing-run' (--feature --areas a,b --next-action s; stamps ISO-precise at, sets last_scribing_run exactly as bee-scribing SKILL.md:112 specifies). Every verb does read-modify-write of ONLY its own fields, preserving all unrelated fields byte-for-byte. Check .bee/bin/hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs for the fields it writes and do not introduce divergent field names. Add test rows to templates/tests/test_lib.mjs covering the matrix in plan.md. Copy the finished template to .bee/bin/bee_state.mjs (vendor copy, identical bytes).

truths: Every verb mutates only its own fields and preserves unrelated state.json fields
Invalid phase, gate name, or boolean is rejected with ERROR/WHY/FIX and exit non-zero, file untouched
gate --approved true run twice yields an identical file (idempotent)
No-verb invocation prints a Use: line listing all verbs
Template and .bee/bin vendor copy are identical
Each verb re-reads state.json immediately before its atomic write (validating: state-sync hook does the same RMW; keep the window minimal)

artifacts.substantive: working CLI with set, gate, worker, scribing-run verbs

key_links: Field names written match what .bee/bin/hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs and bee_status.mjs read
scribing-run writes the exact key set bee-scribing SKILL.md:112 requires including ISO at
prohibitions: Do not modify lib/state.mjs semantics or hooks
Do not add verbs beyond set, gate, worker, scribing-run
Do not weaken any existing test_lib.mjs assertion

trace.outcome: Created skills/bee-hive/templates/bee_state.mjs (set/gate/worker/scribing-run verbs, thin-CLI shape matching bee_cells.mjs), vendored byte-identical to .bee/bin/bee_state.mjs, and added 13 CLI-entry test cases to test_lib.mjs covering happy paths, enum rejections, idempotence, RMW field-preservation, and the Use: no-verb/unknown-verb contract.
deviations: scribing-run has no --phase flag in the plan/cell, but bee-scribing SKILL.md:112 requires the step to also touch "top-level phase/next_action". Filled the gap by hardcoding state.phase = 'compounding' on scribing-run (the fixed next node after bee-scribing in AGENTS.md's workflow chain, an existing enum value, not an invented one) and mirroring --next-action into the top-level next_action field alongside the nested last_scribing_run.next_action. Auto-added per deviation rule 2 (missing functionality the cell's must-have 'scribing-run writes the exact key set bee-scribing SKILL.md:112 requires' depends on).
